evals.prompt: Write an Instagram post announcing FreyAI Visions' Testphase launch. We're looking for 10 Handwerksbetriebe to try the system. Make it compelling and use Jonas's founder story.
evals.expected_output: Instagram post with scroll-stopping hook, founder story mention, PAS or curiosity gap technique, casual du tone, 2-5 emojis, CTA to DM or link in bio, relevant hashtags

assertions.name: scroll-stopping-hook
assertions.description: First line must be a compelling hook that would stop a thumb-scrolling Handwerker

assertions.name: founder-story-present
assertions.description: References Jonas's Steinmetz background or personal journey authentically

assertions.name: persuasion-technique-used
assertions.description: Uses at least 2 persuasion techniques from the toolkit (PAS, curiosity gap, scarcity, specificity, future pacing, social proof)

assertions.name: no-english-words
assertions.description: Zero English words in the German content (no Features, Tool, Update, Dashboard, App, Startup, Beta, DM, Laptop, Software, Link). Use Testphase, Direktnachricht, Rechner, Programm, Verweis instead.

assertions.name: no-generic-ai-copy
assertions.description: No generic AI phrases (revolutionieren, innovative Lösung, skalierbar, Potenzial entfalten, optimieren)

assertions.name: instagram-emojis
assertions.description: Must include 2-5 emojis (zero emojis = fail, more than 5 = fail). Instagram platform norm.

assertions.name: platform-formatting
assertions.description: Follows Instagram format: 150-300 words, line breaks, hashtags at end, CTA (DM or Link in Bio)

assertions.name: scarcity-authentic
assertions.description: Uses legitimate scarcity (10 Beta-Kunden, personal onboarding) not fake urgency

assertions.name: specificity
assertions.description: Contains at least one concrete number, trade name, or specific scenario

evals.prompt: Create a LinkedIn thought leadership post about why most Handwerker fail at digitalization. Position FreyAI as the alternative approach. Professional tone.
evals.expected_output: LinkedIn post with bold opening hook, industry insight, contrarian take, professional Sie tone, no emojis, 3-5 hashtags, engagement question at end

assertions.name: bold-opening-hook
assertions.description: First 140 characters are a compelling hook that works before LinkedIn's truncation

assertions.name: thought-leadership-angle
assertions.description: Provides genuine industry insight, not just product promotion

assertions.name: professional-sie-tone
assertions.description: Uses formal Sie, no emojis, professional register throughout

assertions.name: no-english-words
assertions.description: Zero English words in the German content (no Features, Tool, Update, Dashboard, App, Startup, Beta, DM, Laptop, Software, Link). Use Testphase, Direktnachricht, Rechner, Programm, Verweis instead.

assertions.name: no-generic-ai-copy
assertions.description: No generic AI phrases (revolutionieren, innovative Lösung, skalierbar, Potenzial entfalten, optimieren)

assertions.name: contrarian-or-insight
assertions.description: Challenges a common assumption about Handwerk digitalization

assertions.name: engagement-cta
assertions.description: Ends with a question or prompt that invites comments

assertions.name: brand-voice-premium
assertions.description: Feels premium and confident, not desperate or salesy

evals.prompt: Write a 3-email welcome sequence for new waitlist signups. Each email should build on the previous one. Include subject lines.
evals.expected_output: 3 emails with compelling subject lines (40-60 chars each), personal Jonas tone, escalating value/urgency, DSGVO-compliant, one clear CTA per email, founder story in email 1

assertions.name: three-distinct-emails
assertions.description: Delivers exactly 3 emails that build on each other with escalating engagement

assertions.name: subject-lines-40-60-chars
assertions.description: Each subject line is between 40 and 60 characters (count precisely). Under 40 or over 60 = fail.

assertions.name: personal-jonas-voice
assertions.description: Reads like Jonas wrote it personally, not a marketing template

assertions.name: one-cta-per-email
assertions.description: Each email has exactly one clear call-to-action, not multiple competing CTAs

assertions.name: founder-story-email-1
assertions.description: First email introduces Jonas's background and why FreyAI exists

assertions.name: no-english-words
assertions.description: Zero English words in the German content (no Features, Tool, Update, Dashboard, App, Startup, Beta, DM, Laptop, Software, Link). Use Testphase, Direktnachricht, Rechner, Programm, Verweis instead.

assertions.name: no-generic-ai-copy
assertions.description: No generic AI phrases (revolutionieren, innovative Lösung, skalierbar, Potenzial entfalten, optimieren)

assertions.name: no-fabricated-claims
assertions.description: Testimonials or results must be marked as [Beispiel] if no real beta data exists yet

assertions.name: dsgvo-elements
assertions.description: Includes unsubscribe reference, sender identity (Jonas von FreyAI), contact address
